verses.text: My heart was lifted up in the love of the Most High and was enlarged, that I might praise Him for His name’s sake.
My members were strengthened, that they might not fall from His power.
Infirmities departed from my body, and ceased by the Lord according to His will, for His kingdom is sure.
O Lord, because of them that are deficient, deprive me not of thy Word.
Neither because of their works withhold thou from me thy perfection.
